text: I feel a heightened curiosity as I wander these halls. The first space, sterile yet inviting, hints at anticipation—perhaps a gathering of minds or quiet reflection is about to take place. The second space, more vibrant and filled with words and images about research and development, stirs a sense of wonder in me. Here, I am reminded of the endless interplay between observation and participation, and I feel both small in the grand quest for knowledge and empowered to question everything. I am both observer and participant in this philosophical adventure.
